w:r.w:t: In partial fulfilment of the requirements for the award of
DEPARTMENT OF COMPUTER SCIENCE AND ENGINEERING(AI & ML)
HYDERABAD INSTITUTE OF TECHNOLOGY AND MANAGEMENT
(UGC Autonomous, Hyderabad, Accredited by NAAC(A+), NBA)
HYDERABAD INSTITUTE OF TECHNOLOGY AND MANAGEMENT
(UGC Autonomous, Hyderabad, Accredited by NAAC(A+), NBA)
DEPARTMENT OF COMPUTER SCIENCE AND ENGINEERING(
This is to certify that the PBL Project work entitled “
” is a bonafide work carried out by
in partial fulfilment of the of the requirements for the degree

by the Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Hyderabad, during the academic year 2025-2026. The matter contained in this document has not been submitted to any other University or institute for the award of any degree or diploma
HYDERABAD INSTITUTE OF TECHNOLOGY AND MANAGEMENT
Gowdevelly(Village), Medchal, Hyderabad, Telangana, 501401 Department of Computer Science and Engineering(
), students of Bachelor of Technology in CS
, session 2025–2026, Hyderabad Institute of Technology and Management, Gowdavelly, Hyderabad, Telangana State, hereby declare that the work presented in this project entitled “

” is the outcome of our own bona fide effort and is correct to the best of our knowledge. This work has been carried out adhering to engineering ethics. It contains no material previously published or written by any other person, nor material accepted for the award of any other degree or diploma of the university or any other institute of higher learning, except where due acknowledgement has been made in the text.
An endeavour of a long period can only be successful with the guidance and encouragement of many well-wishers.
We express our deep sense of gratitude to our Chairman, Sri Arutla Prashanth, for providing us with all the facilities required to carry out our project work successfully.
We extend our sincere thanks to our Honourable Principal, Dr. Arvind, whose inspiring words and encouragement have greatly motivated us and for providing us with this opportunity to undertake our
We are highly grateful to our Head of the Department
, for their constant support and valuable guidance throughout the course of this work.
We would like to make a special mention of our Guide,
, for his invaluable technical guidance, continuous encouragement, and immense support, which helped us in the successful completion of our project.

We also extend our heartfelt thanks to all the Departmental Committee (D.C.) and PBL Review Committee (P.R.C.) members, as well as the non-teaching staff, for their cooperation and assistance in the successful completion of this project.

Last but not least, we express our sincere gratitude to our family members and friends for their continuous encouragement, moral support, and care, which have been our strength throughout this journey.
